title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: REDMOND COUNSELING CLINIC COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health and substance use disorder counseling, including screenings and assessments, treatment for eating disorders, and individual, couples, group, family counseling, peer support, and case care management. In-person and Telehealth treatment options are available. Medication management is available through tele-psychiatry. 215 SW 7th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 388-8459 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 388-8459 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by services; accepts most private insurance, Medicaid, and a sliding scale is available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5:30pm Services: Case/Care Management * Mental Health Issues Conjoint Counseling Eating Disorders Treatment Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Medication Information/Management Peer Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REDMOND COUNSELING CLINIC
